input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Mount Sinai Hospital. There are 10 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "gi", "count": 3, "message": "3 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "neuro", "count": 3, "message": "3 neuro patients incoming", "protocol": "Stroke code readiness \u2014 cluster of neuro presentations"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 528, "current_utilization": 12, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: []. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Mount Sinai has 10 incoming patients, including clusters of 3 GI patients and 3 neuro patients. Activate infection control protocols for GI and ensure stroke code readiness for neuro. Current capacity is stable for the next 2 hours.
